decisions.decision: Manually commit SUMMARY.md when executor stalls
decisions.rationale: Stream watchdog false alarm; per workflow fallback rule (verify via FS + git, never block indefinitely).

decisions.decision: Drop the pre-execute stash on resume
decisions.rationale: review.default_reviewers belongs in config.json permanently; STACK.md note was a research clarification, not a project change.

decisions.decision: Accept 422 for protected fields in manifest_patch (not silent ignore as plan prose said)
decisions.rationale: Plan test test_patch_cannot_set_protected_fields explicitly requires 422. Plan prose and test are inconsistent; test is the authoritative contract. Exectuor chose safer 422.
Per executor deviation #1: routes look up the job first, returning 404 consistently with GET /jobs/{id}. Security invariant (no filesystem access) preserved either way.
